# Display properties for modifiers generated by the private construction system.
goods_input_construction_add = {
	decimals = 1
	color = bad
	game_data = { ai_value = 0 }
}

goods_output_construction_add = {
	decimals = 1
	color = good
	game_data = { ai_value = 0 }
}

building_group_bg_private_construction_employee_mult = {
	decimals = 1
	color = good
	game_data = { ai_value = 0 }
}
